nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, p.display_name AS primary_evaluator_name, r.display_name AS review_evaluator_name, b.code AS board_code
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = sa.script_id
JOIN   faculty_cache p ON p.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   faculty_cache r ON r.employee_id = ea.evaluator_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = a.board_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND  a.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND  a.block_status = 'NONE'
  AND  ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY'
  AND  ea.status = 'FROZEN'
  AND  ea.is_active = TRUE
  AND  ea.parent_attempt_id IS NULL
  AND  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM   evaluation_attempt ra
    WHERE  ra.parent_attempt_id = ea.id
      AND ra.attempt_type = 'REVIEW'
      AND ra.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
      AND ra.is_active = TRUE
  )
ORDER  BY a.urn ASC
LIMIT  1000;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.code, answer_script.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
